0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne's background process that optimizes memory organization, inspired by human sleep's role in memory consolidation."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"What Sleep Does"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"During each sleep cycle, Mnemosyne:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scans"}]," Working Memory for consolidation candidates"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Ranks"}]," entries by importance, recency, and access patterns"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotes"}]," high-value entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extracts"}]," structured facts for Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compresses"}]," related entries using AAAK"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evicts"}]," entries that exceed retention limits"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Trigger Conditions"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep cycles trigger on:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Time interval"}],": Every ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_interval"}]," seconds (default: 3600)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity pressure"}],": When Working Memory reaches 80% of max"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Explicit call"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," for manual consolidation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Shutdown"}],": Graceful process exit"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Missing diagram content"}]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\nmem = Memory(\n  consolidation_interval=1800,  # 30 minutes\n  working_max=500,\n  eviction_policy=\"lru_importance\",  # or \"fifo\", \"random\"\n)\n\n# Manual sleep\nmem.sleep()\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Retention Policies"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Policy | Behavior | Use Case |\n|--------|----------|----------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"lru_importance"}]," | Evict least-recently used, weighted by importance | General purpose |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fifo"}]," | First-in, first-out | Streaming data |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"random"}]," | Random eviction | Testing only |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_only"}]," | Evict lowest importance | Quality-focused |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Monitoring Consolidation"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"stats = mem.stats()\nprint(f\"Last sleep: {stats.last_sleep_at}\")\nprint(f\"Consolidated: {stats.consolidated_count}\")\nprint(f\"Evicted: {stats.evicted_count}\")\nprint(f\"Extracted facts: {stats.extracted_facts_count}\")\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Impact"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep consolidation runs in a background thread and does not block agent operations. On typical hardware, a full cycle processes ~1000 entries in under 5 seconds."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/1324ugbfcq7x6.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"hOmP2Cy-yrrgTKgwHamoc"}
